selections.name: Zip Me Up
selections.reason: Boasts the highest class (114) and speed (111) figures in the field. Tactical draw allows for a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: Sacred Sound
selections.reason: Solid speed figures (105) and strong connections with Miller/Hernandez. Should be pressing the pace early.

selections.name: Zadra
selections.reason: High class rating (113) makes her a major threat despite the outside draw. Forgiving her last start.

selections.name: Up For The Hunt
selections.reason: Capable of popping a big figure (106 speed) at a price. Good value for the bottom of exotics.

danger_horse.name: Zuzu's Classic Gal
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter from the Mark Glatt barn (18% win rate). Could be live at a price.

selections.name: Can't Say That
selections.reason: Heavy class drop and strong speed figures (98). Kimura takes the mount, making her the clear standout.

selections.name: Lady Ruth
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 91 class rating. Should get a clean outside stalking trip.

selections.name: Stormy Gal
selections.reason: Inside draw is a major plus at the 1-mile dirt distance. Tactical speed to secure position.

selections.name: Hard Hearted
selections.reason: Owns the highest speed figure (99) but lacks the class of the top choices. Needs a perfect trip.

danger_horse.name: Despite
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the rail on a track that heavily favors inside trips at this distance. Could outrun her odds.

selections.name: She's No Quant
selections.reason: Elite speed (116) and class (114) ratings. Hernandez rides for Freeman; looks very tough to beat.

selections.name: Tiger Of The Sea
selections.reason: Rail draw is beneficial. High class rating (110) and Jaramillo in the irons makes her a prime contender.

selections.name: Tequilaandtherapy
selections.reason: Boasts the highest speed figure in the race (117). Wide draw is a slight concern but has the raw talent.

selections.name: Tam's Little Angel
selections.reason: Solid speed (114) and consistent form. Should be running on late for a piece of the pie.

danger_horse.name: Bessie Coleman
danger_horse.reason: Good form and solid speed figures. Fresu is a dangerous jockey on the turf.

selections.name: Nayar
selections.reason: Bob Baffert first-time starter with Juan Hernandez up. Drawn the rail in a 5F dirt sprint; the one to catch.

selections.name: Clear And Present
selections.reason: D'Amato trainee with Fresu riding. Strong pedigree for early speed and should press the favorite.

selections.name: Billy Goat
selections.reason: Doug O'Neill first-timer with Jaramillo. Outside draw keeps him out of trouble early.

selections.name: Schooner
selections.reason: Dan Blacker and Hector Berrios team up. Solid works suggest he is ready for a good debut.

danger_horse.name: Kennyten
danger_horse.reason: Vladimir Cerin trainee could show early foot and disrupt the pace scenario.

selections.name: Booked Clubhouse
selections.reason: Outside draw is a massive advantage on the unique downhill turf course. High class (107) and speed (111).

selections.name: Owl
selections.reason: Owns a field-best 118 speed figure. Middle draw is workable and Ayuso is riding well.

selections.name: High King
selections.reason: Strong speed (113), but the inside draw on the downhill course is a historical disadvantage. Still talented.

selections.name: De Facto
selections.reason: Favorable outside draw and solid speed figures. Can sit a good trip crossing the dirt.

danger_horse.name: Doing Time
danger_horse.reason: Good class and speed combo. Kimura is an excellent turf rider who can navigate the hill.

selections.name: Attack Now
selections.reason: Standout on paper with a 107 speed figure and 96 class rating. Jaramillo should secure a prime spot.

selections.name: Treximo
selections.reason: Solid speed (100) and an outside draw which keeps him clear of the kickback. Logical alternative.

selections.name: Texas Wildcat
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 99 speed figure. Frey can place him just off the early speed.

selections.name: Tess Of Hemet
selections.reason: Outside draw in a sprint is helpful. Has enough speed to hit the board at a decent price.

danger_horse.name: Johnlino
danger_horse.reason: Speed figure of 103 is surprisingly high for a 30/1 shot. Could be a massive overlay.

selections.name: Resolve
selections.reason: Elite class rating (111) and strong speed (116). Kimura is a top-tier turf rider who will save ground.

selections.name: Hey Jessie
selections.reason: High class (110) and speed (113). Jaramillo will likely have her forwardly placed in a race lacking pace.

selections.name: Watchtower
selections.reason: Highest speed figure in the field (118). Rail draw at 1 1/4 miles is perfect for a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Innovative
selections.reason: Solid speed (115) and class (109). Gonzalez can work out a good trip from the inside.

danger_horse.name: Dreaming Of Abba
danger_horse.reason: Pops a 115 speed figure and offers great value at 15/1. Dangerous if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Gettinby
selections.reason: Highest class rating (109) and strong speed. Hernandez rides the heavy favorite who looks dominant.

selections.name: Pokerknightatvees
selections.reason: Rail draw is golden here. High speed (114) and class (108) make him the primary threat.

selections.name: Clouseau
selections.reason: Solid speed (112) and tactical ability. Kimura will have him in the mix turning for home.

selections.name: Mega Moon
selections.reason: Good speed figure (113). Berrios can stalk the pace and pick up the pieces late.

danger_horse.name: Tom Seaver
danger_horse.reason: Massive overlay potential. A 115 speed figure at 30/1 is too good to ignore for exotic tickets.

selections.name: Shangrilama (ire)
selections.reason: Highest class rating (107) and strong speed (115). Jaramillo should get a clean trip from the outside.

selections.name: Candy Bar
selections.reason: Owns the highest speed figure (119). Rail draw is advantageous if she breaks cleanly.

selections.name: Long Mayshe Reign
selections.reason: Great speed (118) and class (103). Offers excellent value at 15/1 on the morning line.

selections.name: Corporal Violette (ire)
selections.reason: Solid speed (117) and class (104). Another longshot that fits well in this wide-open field.

danger_horse.name: Andiamo Ragazza
danger_horse.reason: High speed figure (118) and Hernandez takes the mount. Must be respected.
